subject: npmx Weekly #5
headline: npmx Weekly #5
intro: This week, significant updates have been rolled out to enhance user experience and improve application performance. Key bug fixes and feature integrations ensure npmx remains reliable and user-friendly.

topics.title: npmx repo hits 2k stars
topics.summary: Within a month after its first commit, the npmx repository hit the 2,000-star milestone—coincidentally on the lead's birthday. The project continues to grow rapidly, already surpassing 2,200 stars by the time of this update.

topics.title: Community Holiday & Recharging
topics.summary: The npmx community took a week-long break from February 14th to 21st to 'touch grass.' The Discord was paused as members shared nature photos, emphasizing the vital importance of rest within open-source communities.

topics.title: Join the npmx.social PDS
topics.summary: Bailey Townsend’s PDS Moover tool is simplifying Bluesky migrations to the npmx.social PDS. This EU-hosted server provides a streamlined bridge for users to transition their data while staying synced with the wider network.
